issues: INACCURACY: Article states 'Elf Sektoren gelten als kritisch' and lists 11 sectors. The final KRITIS-DachG (as passed by Bundestag 29.01.2026 and Bundesrat 06.03.2026) defines 10 sectors, not 11. The CER Directive itself (EU 2022/2557) has 11 sectors in its Annex, but the German transposition removed 'öffentliche Verwaltung' as a separate sector and combined/adjusted to reach 10 sectors in the national law. Multiple legal sources confirm '10 Sektoren' for KRITIS-DachG

The article claims the 11 sectors 'entsprechen dem Anhang der EU-CER-Richtlinie' — while the CER Directive Annex has 11 sectors, the German law has 10, so this attribution is imprecise even if partially correct
KRITIS-DachG dates (Bundestag 29.01.2026, Bundesrat 06.03.2026) confirmed correct
Krankenhaus threshold of 30.000 vollstationäre Fälle confirmed correct against BSI-KritisV
Registration deadline 'voraussichtlich ab Mitte 2026' is hedged appropriately and consistent with the law's transition provisions
4 sources including bsi.bund.de and Wikipedia — sources adequate
articles.fixInstructions: Correct the sector count from 'Elf' to 'Zehn'. Update the list of sectors to match the KRITIS-DachG Anlage exactly: Energie, Transport und Verkehr, Bankwesen, Finanzmarktinfrastrukturen, Gesundheit, Trinkwasser, Abwasser, Digitale Infrastruktur, Weltraum, Lebensmittel — ten sectors total. Remove 'öffentliche Verwaltung' from the list or note it is a CER sector not adopted verbatim in the KRITIS-DachG. Correct the attribution: 'Diese Sektoren orientieren sich am Anhang der EU-CER-Richtlinie (EU 2022/2557), weichen aber in Details ab.'
